title: Big Globe - Mythic Upgrades Compatibility
description: Adds compatibility between Big Globe and Mythic Upgrades
body:
A compatibility Datapack that places the various gem ores and geodes from Mythic Upgrades into a Big Globe world

Gem and Geode Spawn Locations below:

  Overworld:
  
    Topaz      - Molten Caves and Sandy Caves
    Aquamarine - Frozen Caves
    Peridot    - Lush Caves
    
  Nether:
  
    Ruby       - Crimson Forests
    Sapphire   - Valley of Souls
    
  End:
  
    Ametrine   - All Land biomes outside the main End Island
    Nicoium    - All Land biomes outside the main End Island (has no Geode counterpart)
